sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80725" key="pentartabiai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πενταρτᾰβ-ιαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80725.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of five</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ</foreign>., ib.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Oxy.:1760:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1760.8</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(ii A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
